app_tagline: Scientific watering decisions using weather data and ETo calculation
about_description: Select a location and crop type to fetch weather data from Open-Meteo API. The app calculates reference evapotranspiration (ETo) using FAO Penman-Monteith method and daylight hours with astral, then provides today's watering recommendation and a weekly forecast.
pain_point_description: Agricultural watering based on intuition leads to over- or under-watering, impacting crop yields. This app provides science-based watering decisions for efficient water management.
gps_info: Uses browser geolocation to auto-detect your position. Please allow location access when prompted.
gps_fallback: Could not retrieve location. Please enter coordinates manually.
gps_not_available: GPS auto-detect requires the streamlit-js-eval package. Please enter coordinates manually.
